en.ahmedali: So, the intercession of intercessors will not avail them.
en.ahmedraza: So the intercession of the intercessors will not benefit them. (The disbelievers will not have any intercessor.)
en.arberry: Then the intercession of the intercessors shall not profit them.
en.daryabadi: Then there will not Profit them intercision of the interceders,
en.hilali: So no intercession of intercessors will be of any use to them.
en.itani: But the intercession of intercessors will not help them.
en.maududi: The intercession of the intercessors shall then be of no avail to them.
en.mubarakpuri: So no intercession of intercessors will be of any use to them.
en.pickthall: The mediation of no mediators will avail them then.
en.qarai: So the intercession of the intercessors will not avail them.
en.qaribullah: The intercession of their intercessors shall not benefit them.
en.sahih: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.
en.sarwar: The intercession of the intercessors will be of no benefit to them.
en.shakir: So the intercession of intercessors shall not avail them.
en.wahiduddin: So no intercession will avail them.
en.yusufali: Then will no intercession of (any) intercessors profit them.
fa.ansarian: پس آنان را شفاعت شفیعان سودی نمی دهد؛
fa.fooladvand: از اين رو شفاعت شفاعت‌كنندگان به حال آنها سودى نمى‌بخشد.
fa.ghomshei: پس شفاعت شفیعان در حق آنان هیچ سودی نبخشد.
fa.khorramdel: دیگر شفاعت و میانجیگری شفاعت‌کنندگان و میانجیگران (اعم از فرشتگان و پیغمبران و صالحان) بدیشان سودی نمی‌بخشد. [[«فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ ...»: (نگا: انعام / 51 و 70، شعراء / 100، غافر / 18).]]
fa.makarem: از این رو شفاعت شفاعت‌کنندگان به حال آنها سودی نمی‌بخشد.
fa.mojtabavi: پس شفاعت شفيعان به آنها سود ندهد.
